questions.question: List two non-renewable and two renewable energy resources. Give one advantage and one disadvantage of each.
expectedPoints: Correctly identifies two from each category (e.g., Coal/Oil & Solar/Wind).
States one valid advantage for each (e.g., Coal: cheap; Solar: clean).
States one valid disadvantage for each (e.g., Coal: polluting; Solar: intermittent).

questions.question: Discuss the environmental impacts associated with the large-scale use of fossil fuels. Suggest two renewable alternatives that can help mitigate these impacts and explain your choices.
expectedPoints: Discusses air pollution (SO₂, NOx, PM) and its effects.
Discusses greenhouse gas emissions (CO₂) and link to climate change.
Discusses other impacts (e.g., oil spills, mining damage).
Suggests appropriate alternatives (e.g., Solar & Wind for electricity).
Explains how alternatives mitigate the impacts (e.g., zero operational emissions).
